extDesc.message: Professional focus and study assistant for YouTube.

masterDesc.message: Disable all features with one click

hardcoreModalTitle.message: You Are About to Break Focus!

hardcoreModalDesc.message: You are about to turn off the master switch and bring back distractions. If you are absolutely sure, type the exact text below:

welcomeSubtitle.message: You have transformed YouTube from a time trap into a professional learning and research hub.

feature1Desc.message: State your purpose before entering. Block impulsive clicks and focus only on what you seek.

feature2Desc.message: When tempted to turn off the switch, strengthen your willpower with our deterrent lock mechanism.

feature3Desc.message: Shorts, recommendations, comments, and stimulating colors will no longer distract you.

privacyDesc.message: PureTube operates on the 'Least Privilege' principle. Your intents and settings are never sent to a remote server. All processes happen strictly on your local device.

versionNotes.message:
v1.0.0 Release Notes:
🚀 Initial release!
🎯 Smart Intent Filter added
🔒 Willpower Lock active
🌍 4 Languages & Dyslexia Support

intentTitle.message: What will you focus on today?
